regional_cost_note: Carpet laying in Tauranga typically costs $20–$25/sqm for labour. Total supply and installation ranges $50–$90/sqm depending on carpet grade and floor prep required.

businesses.name: Richard Lewis
businesses.known_for: Carpet and vinyl layer with 20+ years experience, supplies most carpet ranges at wholesale pricing and services Tauranga with no additional travel charges.

businesses.name: Murrays Carpet Services
businesses.known_for: Family-owned since 1978, specialising in carpet and vinyl laying, cleaning and repairs throughout Tauranga and Western Bay of Plenty.

businesses.name: Sunset Flooring
businesses.known_for: Carpet installation, repairs, restretching and vinyl work across the Bay of Plenty, run by sole trader Seamus Sadler with verified credentials.
